name: Western Union
description_short: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving Oklahoma with competitive auto loans, savings accounts, and deposit products.
description_long:
Western Sun Federal Credit Union (WSFCU) is a federally-chartered credit union based in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma, operating multiple branches across the Tulsa area and surrounding communities. The institution serves members through a community-focused mission emphasizing friendly, professional service and personalized financial solutions. As a credit union, WSFCU is member-owned and not-for-profit, with deposits insured by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) up to $250,000.

WFSCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans (as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles), boat loans, certificates of deposit (CDs) with rates up to 3.46% APY, money market accounts, checking and savings accounts, and mortgage lending services. The credit union features a Kasasa Cash Back Checking account providing 3% cash back on debit card purchases up to $400 per cycle, subject to qualification requirements. Members can access online banking, apply for loans online or in person, and benefit from multiple branch locations with ATMs and drive-through services across the Tulsa metropolitan area.

WFSCU distinguishes itself through active community engagement, hosting member events like annual car shows, shred days, and financial education seminars. The credit union emphasizes member testimonials and personal service, highlighting staff assistance with credit repair goals. Their rate offerings are competitive within the credit union space, and they provide free auto-buying resources to help members find vehicles locally.

As a regional credit union, WSFCU's reach is limited to the Oklahoma service area, which may limit convenience for members outside Tulsa and surrounding communities. While rates are competitive, membership eligibility depends on employment, residence, or family connections within their field of membership. The institution's educational content library and community involvement are strong, though specific loan approval criteria and membership requirements are not fully detailed on the website.
address: 606 Long Beach Blvd, Long Beach, NY 11561

pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles with online application option
Kasasa Cash Back Checking offering 3% cash back on up to $400 in debit card purchases per cycle
CD rates up to 3.46% APY and competitive savings rates for deposit products
Multiple branch locations in Broken Arrow, Bixby, and Downtown Tulsa with ATMs and extended drive-through hours (7:30am-5:30pm weekdays, Saturday service available)
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure with NCUA deposit insurance protection
Active community engagement with financial education, free resources, and member events
Boat loan offerings as low as 7.64% APR for members seeking specialized lending
cons: Service area limited to Oklahoma (Tulsa region primarily), restricting convenience for members outside this geographic area
Membership eligibility requirements not transparently detailed on website—likely restricted by employment, residence, or family membership criteria
Loan rates subject to change and credit approval, with specific qualification requirements for promotional rates and cash back checking account
Limited digital banking features discussed; no mention of mobile app functionality or advanced online services
Money market rates relatively low at 1.20% APY compared to some online alternatives
best_for: Oklahoma residents and employees in the Tulsa area seeking competitive auto and boat loans with local branch service
Credit union members prioritizing cash back rewards on debit card spending through qualifying checking accounts
Consumers looking to build or improve credit with personalized service and member-focused assistance
Savers seeking NCUA-insured deposit products with competitive rates through a not-for-profit financial institution
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma residents and employees within the Tulsa service area seeking competitive auto/boat lending, cash back checking rewards, and personalized member service through a not-for-profit credit union structure. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—membership eligibility and branch access are restricted to the Oklahoma region, making this option unsuitable for those outside the Tulsa area or without qualifying membership criteria.
services: Auto loans (new and used vehicles, rates from 5.49% APR)
Checking accounts with Kasasa Cash Back rewards (3% cash back on debit purchases)
Certificates of Deposit (CDs, rates up to 3.46% APY)
Money Market accounts (rates up to 1.20% APY)
ATM access at multiple branch locations
Free auto-buying resource tool for vehicle shopping
